summary: Iteration 47: Bug Fixes Testing - All 4 fixes verified. (1) Input text visibility fixed - white text on dark login page, dark text on light admin pages. (2) Availability delete button working with Trash2 icon. (3) Username space validation - frontend auto-strips, backend rejects with 400. (4) Skeleton loaders present in AdminDashboard, ShiftScheduler, StaffTimeOff. (5) Partial-day time display 'Unavail: 09:00 - 13:00' working in Shift Scheduler.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: input.jsx: text-slate-900, caret-indigo-600, placeholder:text-slate-400 applied correctly
select.jsx: text-slate-900 on SelectTrigger and SelectContent
Login.js: Lines 107,121 have focus-visible:bg-slate-800/80 + text-white for dark theme inputs
StaffTimeOff.js: handleDeleteAvailRule() removes rule via PUT /api/availability/my, Trash2 icon visible
ShiftScheduler.js: Lines 281-285 show partial-day format 'Unavail: {from} - {to}' for soft blocks
RestaurantSettings.js: Line 839 uses .replace(/\s/g, '') to auto-strip spaces from username input
auth.py: Line 16-17 validates username has no spaces, returns 400 if spaces found
staff.py: Line 24-25 validates username has no spaces, returns 400 if spaces found
AdminDashboard.js: Skeleton loader with data-testid='dashboard-skeleton' during loading state
ShiftScheduler.js: Skeleton rows in tbody during loading state
StaffTimeOff.js: Skeleton loader with data-testid='timeoff-skeleton' during loading state
seed_data_creation: Test availability rules created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified all 4 bug fixes: (1) Input text visibility - Login page uses text-white on dark bg, admin pages use text-slate-900 on light bg. (2) Availability delete - Trash2 icon next to each rule, clicking removes via PUT /api/availability/my. (3) Username spaces - Frontend auto-strips via .replace(/\s/g, ''), backend rejects with 400 'Username cannot contain spaces'. (4) Skeleton loaders - AdminDashboard, ShiftScheduler, StaffTimeOff all have skeleton states during data fetch. (5) Partial-day display - Shift Scheduler shows 'Unavail: 09:00 - 13:00' format for soft blocks with from/to times. Shift Scheduler URL is /workforce/shifts not /shift-scheduler.

login_text_visibility.evidence: Screenshot shows white text 'testuser' clearly visible on dark slate-800 background, text-white class confirmed in input

admin_input_visibility.evidence: Settings page inputs show dark text (text-slate-900) on light bg (bg-slate-100/80), all form fields readable

username_space_frontend.evidence: Typing 'test user with spaces' in staff dialog results in 'testuserwithspaces' - spaces auto-stripped

username_space_backend_register.evidence: POST /api/auth/register with 'test user' returns 400 'Username cannot contain spaces'

username_space_backend_staff.evidence: POST /api/restaurant/staff with 'staff with spaces' returns 400 'Username cannot contain spaces'

availability_delete_button.evidence: Trash2 icon visible next to availability rules, data-testid='delete-avail-rule-{i}' present

availability_delete_functionality.evidence: Clicking delete removes rule, toast shows 'Availability rule removed', page shows 'No recurring unavailability set'

partial_day_display.evidence: Shift Scheduler shows 'Unavail: 09:00 - 13:00' for partial-day availability blocks

scheduler_skeleton.evidence: Skeleton rows visible in shift grid tbody during loading

select_text_visibility.evidence: SelectTrigger has text-slate-900 class, dropdown content readable

textarea_text_visibility.evidence: Textarea component has text-slate-900 class in className
